name: 4virtue-chatbot-training
description: Simulador local de treino do agente de prospeccao da 4virtue: roda o agente (bot sob teste) contra ICPs simulados via OpenRouter e gera transcricoes JSON para analise.

scripts.test: node test/empty-recovery.test.mjs && node test/icp-decision.test.mjs && node test/routing.test.mjs
